elite_framework.primary_regulation: Local/Regional Critical Infrastructure Protection Laws (e.g., NIS2 in EU, NERC CIP, etc.)
elite_framework.sovereignty_level: High Data Residency / Sovereign Cloud Requirements
elite_framework.risk_modeling: Value-at-Risk (High Impact on National Essential Services & Public Safety)
elite_framework.key_vendors_context: Strategic local partners + Hyperscalers with strictly local/sovereign regions
elite_framework.strategic_priorities: Systemic Resilience, Jurisdictional Immunity, Secure IT/OT Convergence
